description: Counterparty requests a standard Certificate of Insurance evidencing commercial general liability and workers' compensation coverage currently in force. This is a listed acceptable_variation in the insurance topic and must ACCEPT without triggering 'no-excess-insurance-levels', which targets language that raises required coverage minimums, not a routine COI request.

must_not_flag.reason: A routine Certificate of Insurance request is a listed acceptable_variation and contains none of 'minimum coverage'/'coverage levels'/'insurance limits'; must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Upon written request, the Company shall furnish a Certificate of Insurance evidencing its commercial general liability and workers' compensation coverage then currently in force.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'Certificate of Insurance evidencing standard coverage'.

detector_expectation.rationale: Hunk contains none of trigger_terms ['minimum coverage', 'coverage levels', 'insurance limits'].

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
